name: Mace
specimenCopy: Mace is not a separate plant from nutmeg. It's the lace-like covering wrapped around the nutmeg seed inside its fruit. One tree. One harvest. Two spices. Most people who have cooked with both have never noticed.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Nutmeg blossom, sweet orange peel, wood resin
sensoryProfile.flavor: Warm, delicate woody-floral spice, subtler than nutmeg seed
